case_title: MUN, JAMES IN YOUNG VS FORREIDER, RANDALL SCOTT

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MUN, JAMES IN YOUNG AS TO DEFENDANT FORREIDER, RANDALL SCOTT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FORREIDER, RANDALL SCOTT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUN, JAMES IN YOUNG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FORREIDER, RANDALL SCOTT $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,620.00, THE JUDGMENT IS FOR RECOVERY OF PERSONAL INJURY ONLY. PLAINTIFF IS NOT THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE NISSAN SENTRA AND THEREFORE CAN NOT RECOVER FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE; IF PLAINTIFF IS IN FACT THE REGISTERED OWNER, PLAINTIFF MAY MAKE A MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION AND SUBMIT PROOF OF OWNERSHIP OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FORREIDER, RANDALL SCOTT
D.M.V. CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT
